verdicts.reasoning: Day 1 slot 1 explicitly states 'Fly Hamburg to La Palma Airport' departing from HAM. Day 8 slot 4 confirms return flight 'SPC → HAM'. Origin Hamburg is satisfied.

Day 1 slot 1 destination is La Palma Airport (SPC). All activities are located on La Palma island (Garafía, Puntagorda, Roque de los Muchachos, Caldera de Taburiente, Santa Cruz de La Palma). Destination La Palma is satisfied.

Day 1 is dated 2026-11-12 (outbound departure). Day 8 is dated 2026-11-19 (return departure). The travel_dates constraint 2026.11.12 to 2026.11.19 is satisfied with outbound on start date and return on end date.

The plan is designed for a single traveler. Accommodation is booked for one person (rural house/small hotel). No children or additional adults are mentioned. Travelers constraint (1 adult) is satisfied.
The plan states 'Total estimated cost: €1538.00' which is below the €2000 budget. All major cost categories are itemized. Budget constraint is satisfied.

Day 1 slot 4 specifies 'Check in to rural house/small hotel' in Garafía/Puntagorda with terrace, minimal lights, and parking. This is in the northwest near Roque de los Muchachos Observatory. Accommodation constraint is satisfied.
Day 1 slot 1 uses flight transport (HAM → SPC). Day 8 slot 4 uses flight transport (SPC → HAM). No excluded transport modes are used. Transport constraint (Flight) is satisfied.

The plan includes multiple stargazing sessions (Day 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7), observatory visits (Day 3), astronomy education (Day 5), dark sky reserve activities, and hiking (Caldera de Taburiente, Roque ridge). All stated interests are represented.
The plan covers all 8 days from 2026-11-12 to 2026-11-19 with activities scheduled each day. No days are left empty or unaccounted for.
Day 1 slot 4 shows check-in on 2026-11-12 at 17:00. Day 8 shows 'Breakfast and check out' at 07:00-08:00. Accommodation is booked for all nights from Day 1 through Day 7 inclusive.

Transport between locations uses driving with realistic time windows: Airport to northwest (2 hours), Garafía/Puntagorda to Roque (1.5 hours), northwest to Caldera (1.5 hours). All durations are feasible.
Meals are planned for each day: breakfast (€8), lunch (€12-€18), dinner (€20-€30). Day 1 includes self-catering groceries option. All days have meal provisions.
Total estimated cost is €1538.00, which is €462 below the €2000 budget. All costs are itemized and reasonable.

Day 3 slot 3 notes observatory visit 'depends on telescope operations and weather'. Day 7 is designated as 'Weather backup buffer'. Day 5 includes backup slot for astronomy education. Weather contingencies are built in.
The plan is designed for 1 adult with no special mobility requirements mentioned. Activities are self-guided or have flexible options. No accessibility barriers are introduced.
